description_long: This sculpture depicts a dynamic human figure with four arms, standing on one leg atop a rounded base with a stepped pedestal. The figure is adorned with a headdress and wears a short skirt, with detailed anatomical features and stylized musculature. Each arm is positioned differently, with one hand raised above the head, another holding an object, and the remaining two in expressive gestures. The surface has a smooth, slightly matte finish with visible sculpting marks, suggesting it is carved from a single piece of stone or resin. The base is polygonal and provides stability, while the overall coloration is a uniform tan or light brown, resembling aged stone or wood. The sculpture's posture and iconography suggest it may represent a deity or mythological figure.
description: A tan, four-armed human figure sculpture stands on one leg atop a polygonal base, with detailed features and a dynamic pose. The surface is smooth and matte, resembling carved stone or wood.
description_view_0: The front view shows the figure's expressive face, four arms in various poses, and detailed torso, with one leg raised and the other supporting the body on a rounded base.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the depth of the figure's limbs and the curvature of the body, with the headdress and arm positions clearly visible in profile.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the back musculature, the arrangement of the arms from behind, and the full shape of the base and pedestal.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the figure's profile, the side of the headdress, and the positioning of the raised leg and arms.
attribute_location_context: No specific installation context is visible; the sculpture appears isolated on a plain background.
